mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adm_meeting_room ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_meeting_room(room_name, location, capacity, has_projector, has_microphone, status) VALUES(#{roomName}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{hasProjector}, #{hasMicrophone}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adm_meeting_room WHERE status = 1 AND id NOT IN ( SELECT room_id FROM adm_room_booking WHERE status = 'BOOKED' AND start_time < #{end} AND end_time > #{start} ) ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_room_booking(room_id, meeting_id, user_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{meetingId}, #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{purpose}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM adm_asset
AND (asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR asset_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_asset(asset_name, asset_code, category, model, dept_id, keeper_id, status) VALUES(#{assetName}, #{assetCode}, #{category}, #{model}, #{deptId}, #{keeperId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE adm_asset SET asset_name=#{assetName}, category=#{category}, model=#{model}, dept_id=#{deptId}, keeper_id=#{keeperId}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_asset_record(asset_id, user_id, action, action_time, remark) VALUES(#{assetId}, #{userId}, #{action}, #{actionTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adm_vehicle ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_vehicle(plate_number, vehicle_model, seats, status) VALUES(#{plateNumber}, #{vehicleModel}, #{seats}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE adm_vehicle SET plate_number=#{plateNumber}, vehicle_model=#{vehicleModel}, seats=#{seats}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_vehicle_record(vehicle_id, user_id, start_time, end_time, destination, purpose) VALUES(#{vehicleId}, #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{destination}, #{purpose})
mapper.update: UPDATE adm_asset SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adm_asset_record WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} ORDER BY action_time DESC
SELECT * FROM adm_room_booking WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE adm_room_booking SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE adm_vehicle SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adm_vehicle_record WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
